positive.stdout:

    netflix_show(black_mirror)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    popular(stranger_things)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~download(karen,black_mirror)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    ~download(karen,X0) | binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~binge_watch(karen,X0) | download(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    karen != black_mirror).

cnf(u37,negated_conjecture,
    ~binge_watch(karen,black_mirror)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    lisa != black_mirror).

cnf(u29,negated_conjecture,
    ~share_with(karen,black_mirror,lisa)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    share_with(karen,X0,lisa) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    netflix_show(stranger_things)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    download(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
